s: Pristina is the capital of Kosovo.
q: What is the capital of Kosovo?
e: Pristina is the capital and largest city of Kosovo. Kosovo is a partially recognized state in the Balkans that declared independence in 2008, though Serbia and some other countries do not recognize it.

s: Tripoli is the capital and largest city of Libya.
q: Which city is the capital of Libya?
e: Tripoli is Libya's capital and main port city, located on the Mediterranean coast in northwestern Libya. It has been an important trading hub for centuries.

s: Ngerulmud is the capital of Palau.
q: What is the capital of Palau, a Pacific island nation?
e: Ngerulmud is the capital of Palau, located in Babeldaob Island. It was chosen as the capital to distribute government functions away from the more populated Koror Island.

s: Castries is the capital of Saint Lucia.
q: What is the capital of the Caribbean island nation of Saint Lucia?
e: Castries is the capital and largest city of Saint Lucia, a volcanic island in the Caribbean Lesser Antilles. It serves as the island's main port and commercial hub.

s: Bali is a major island of Indonesia known for tourism and Hindu culture.
q: Bali is a famous tourist destination and island of which Southeast Asian country?
e: Bali is an island in Indonesia, part of the Lesser Sunda Islands. It is famous for its Hindu temples, rice terraces, beaches, and tourism. About 87% of Bali's population practices Hinduism, unique in Muslim-majority Indonesia.

s: St. George's is the capital of Grenada.
q: What is the capital of the Caribbean nation of Grenada?
e: St. George's is the capital and largest city of Grenada, located on the island's southwestern coast. It is known for its horseshoe-shaped harbor and colorful colonial architecture.

s: The British Virgin Islands are an overseas territory of the United Kingdom in the Caribbean.
q: The British Virgin Islands are an overseas territory of which country?
e: The British Virgin Islands (BVI) are a British Overseas Territory located in the Caribbean, east of the United States Virgin Islands. They consist of about 40 islands and cays.

s: Turks and Caicos Islands are an overseas territory of the United Kingdom.
q: Turks and Caicos Islands are an overseas territory of which nation?
e: Turks and Caicos Islands are a British Overseas Territory comprising about 40 islands and cays in the Atlantic Ocean, southeast of the Bahamas. They are known for tourism and financial services.

s: Cayman Islands are an overseas territory of the United Kingdom in the Caribbean.
q: Cayman Islands are a British overseas territory in which ocean?
e: Cayman Islands are a British Overseas Territory consisting of three islands: Grand Cayman, Cayman Brac, and Little Cayman. They are located northwest of Jamaica and are a major financial and tourism hub.

s: Anguilla is an overseas territory of the United Kingdom in the Caribbean.
q: Anguilla is a British overseas territory located in which sea?
e: Anguilla is a British Overseas Territory in the eastern Caribbean, north of Saint Kitts. It is a flat island known for its white-sand beaches and is popular for tourism.

s: Azores is an autonomous region of Portugal located in the Atlantic Ocean.
q: Azores is an autonomous region of which European country?
e: Azores is an autonomous region of Portugal consisting of nine volcanic islands located in the mid-Atlantic Ocean, about 1,500 km west of mainland Portugal.

s: Willemstad is the capital of Curaçao.
q: What is the capital of Curaçao, a Caribbean island nation?
e: Willemstad is the capital and largest city of Curaçao, a constituent country of the Kingdom of the Netherlands. It is known for its colorful colonial architecture and deep-water harbor.

s: French Guiana is an overseas department of France located in South America.
q: French Guiana is an overseas department of which European nation?
e: French Guiana is an overseas department of France located on the northeastern coast of South America. It is part of the European Union and uses the Euro as currency.

s: Gibraltar is an overseas territory of the United Kingdom.
q: Gibraltar is a British overseas territory located at which geographical point?
e: Gibraltar is a British Overseas Territory at the southern tip of the Iberian Peninsula, controlling the entrance to the Mediterranean Sea from the Atlantic Ocean. It is famous for the Rock of Gibraltar.

s: Guernsey is a Crown dependency of the United Kingdom.
q: Guernsey is a Crown dependency located in which body of water?
e: Guernsey is a Crown dependency of the United Kingdom located in the English Channel, close to France. It is part of the Channel Islands and has its own government and legal system.

s: Isle of Man is a Crown dependency of the United Kingdom.
q: Isle of Man is a Crown dependency located in which sea?
e: Isle of Man is a Crown dependency of the United Kingdom located in the Irish Sea between Great Britain and Ireland. It has its own government, currency, and legal system.

s: Jersey is a Crown dependency of the United Kingdom.
q: Jersey is a Crown dependency located in which channel?
e: Jersey is a Crown dependency of the United Kingdom located in the English Channel off the coast of Normandy, France. It is the largest of the Channel Islands.

s: South Tarawa is the capital of Kiribati.
q: What is the capital of Kiribati, a Pacific island nation?
e: South Tarawa is the capital and administrative center of Kiribati, located on the atoll of Tarawa in the central Pacific Ocean. It is one of the world's most densely populated atolls.

s: Macau is a Special Administrative Region of China.
q: Macau is a Special Administrative Region of which country?
e: Macau is a Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China located on the western side of the Pearl River Delta. It was a former Portuguese colony and is known for casinos and gambling.

s: Madeira is an autonomous region of Portugal.
q: Madeira is an autonomous region of which European country?
e: Madeira is an autonomous region of Portugal consisting of two inhabited islands (Madeira and Porto Santo) and several uninhabited islands. It is located off the northwest coast of Africa in the Atlantic Ocean.
